(eight) Those in half-life are not dead, nor is the root slumbering under the snow (the symbol of both Christ and Dionysos: it looks dead but is only asleep, waiting to be awakened by the voice of spring). We are those slumbering roots. We are dormant. It is difficult intellectually to understand this, that we are neither fully alive nor fully dead (Aristotle taught us that we have to be A or not-A), but in fact these thousands of yea

-14-

Plato himself states that knowledge comes by anamnesis, but I say that the knowledge is encised downward from above, by the forms, and isn't intrinsically there, but is adventitious in the above sense of being given & received by the person, probably in stages. I say, too, that in a sense the Sumuum Bonuum is alive, thus having the attributes of God or a god. But, as I say, as theological as the contents were, the structure falls within the philosophical cosmology of Plato

-15-

I already knew my tutelary spirit wasn't perfect, since I overheard the Godhead blasting it for partiality.

Christianity is indeed (as is said) a revealed Religion. I would know; it was revealed to me (through the forms, being a content with other contents of the Sumuum Bonuum itself, the form of forms, with Christ the Exemplar). The highest value is assigned to primary Christianity, via my experience; I am even more a witness than ever, for this is the structure itself of the universe, o

-1-

The one melancholy aspect of these insights & revelations is the discovery .that the megastate is absolutely diabolical. What was taking place in 1971 through March 1974 was absolute evil at work, the Prince of Darkness assailing & enslaving man. That it has a superior adversary is the only saving thought. No wonder I sensed the odor of Nazism in Solarcon. The grinning skull of Satan lurked behind their Nacht una Nebel activities, right up to 3-74 when they were deposed. Tom Disch was right

September 15, 1976

Dear Dorothy,

I wanted to add a footnote to my earlier letter about my religious discoveries: new light shed on them through an interview with a lady reporter who came to see me yesterday. 29) Hegel: "that which exists is not so much pure mind as mind writ large; i.e. the universe is penetrated by mind + exists for the sake of mind, + it cannot be understood unless this fit is grasped. It's hyperuniverse I.

➀ Was this before hyperuniverse II became deranged?

Yes! Before the fall - before II went wrong. We had two coherent signals, not one healthy one + one sick one. This (state) was man's natural, normal condition - + then Form II "Fell," taking men with it.
